Remento.ad_copy: The most meaningful Father’s Day gift: his voice, forever at your fingertips. Why families love it: 📱 No downloads, logins, or passwords
Remento.headline: ✍️ Speech-to-Story writes for them (without changing their voice)

Remento.ad_copy: Want to capture your loved one's life story without the hassle of writing and typing? Introducing Remento! Tim Ferriss chose it for his mom, calling it an "A+ investment!" • 80% of life stories are never recorded - don't let that be yours!
Remento.headline: Give Remento as a gift & turn memories into a stunning interactive book.

ElliQ.ad_copy: With ElliQ, getting started takes minutes - not hours. From the moment you plug it in, ElliQ fills your home with meaningful conversation and a sense of connection that fits right into your day. ✨ Plug in and go
ElliQ.headline: ✨ Daily check-ins & reminders

ElliQ.ad_copy: A friendly voice. A daily routine. A healthier mind. 💡 ElliQ helps keep minds active and spirits lifted with daily interaction, gentle prompts, and engaging moments that support long-term cognitive health. Sorry, we're having trouble playing this video.

ElliQ.ad_copy: Meet ElliQ, the Smart Care Device designed to support connection, engagement, and independence at home. She's more than technology. She's a companion who's there for you every day. If you're eligible, you can join the ElliQ program at no cost through your insurance plan or your local Area Agency on Aging. Check your eligibility today at www.elliq.com/DSHS
